analysis.archetype_reasoning: Grounded, traditional profile focused on career and clear relationship goals. Earnest and straightforward, no playful banter, high openness to a serious connection.
analysis.key_detail: She is a Project Coordinator at the Quality Council of India and pursuing her Masters at Delhi University.
analysis.their_last_message: Khushi is a 23-year-old Project Coordinator at the Quality Council of India in Delhi who values traditional traits and seeks a long-term relationship.
